results.title: RivCo WPSL Soccer Team Represents SoCal In The 2026 Regional Semifinals
results.description: SoCal Union FC, Temecula's WPSL team, moves on to the round of 16 in the Women's Premier Soccer League Regional Semifinals on Saturday.
